data.title: BioVaxys Completes Third Tranche of Private Placement and Settles Debt
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

BioVaxys Technology ( (TSE:BIOV) ) has shared an update.

BioVaxys Technology Corp. has completed the third tranche of its private placement, raising $537,500 through the issuance of 10,750,000 units at $0.05 per unit. Each unit includes a common share and a warrant convertible into an additional share at $0.15 until January 10, 2027. The proceeds will be used for working capital, and no finder’s fees were incurred. The company also issued 5,000,000 shares at $0.10 per share to settle $500,000 of debt with an external consultant. This financial maneuvering is expected to support BioVaxys’s ongoing operations and enhance its market positioning as it continues to develop its immunotherapy platforms.

More about BioVaxys Technology

BioVaxys Technology Corp., based in British Columbia, Canada, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative immunotherapies using its DPX™ technology platform and HapTenix© ‘neoantigen’ tumor cell construct platform. These platforms are designed to treat cancers, infectious diseases, and other immunological conditions by inducing targeted, long-lasting immune responses.

YTD Price Performance: -10.0%

Average Trading Volume: 514,112

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $10.68M

Global Uranium Corp. ( (TSE:GURN) ) has provided an update.

Global Uranium Corp. has extended its marketing agreement with Euro Digital Media Ltd. for an additional 45 days, beginning January 13, 2025, with the aim of enhancing its online presence through campaigns, ads, and keyword optimization. Additionally, the company has engaged Allcaps Media for a 90-day marketing service to improve visibility and optimize content for search engines, which could potentially impact its industry positioning and stakeholder engagement.

More about Global Uranium Corp.

Global Uranium Corp. operates in the uranium industry, focusing on the production and marketing of uranium resources. The company is involved in enhancing its market presence through strategic marketing engagements.

data.title: HYTN Innovations Secures Initial Order in Global Cannabis Expansion
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from HYTN Innovations Inc ( (TSE:HYTN) ).

HYTN Innovations Inc. announced the receipt of an initial purchase order under its partnership with SNDL Inc., a major player in the cannabis industry. This collaboration, which involves using EU Good Manufacturing Practice standards, aims to enhance their presence in the international cannabis market. The partnership highlights HYTN’s ability to produce high-volume, EU GMP-certified cannabis and supports SNDL’s expansion into global markets. The agreement positions both companies to capitalize on the growing global cannabis industry, with significant opportunities in regions like Germany and Australia.

More about HYTN Innovations Inc

HYTN Innovations Inc. is a pharmaceutical company that specializes in the manufacturing of pharmaceutical-grade cannabis. The company is focused on expanding its presence in regulated international markets, including the UK, Germany, and Australia.

data.title: Premium Resources Files Initial Resource Estimate for Selkirk Mine
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

North American Nickel ( (DE:R10) ) just unveiled an update.

Premium Resources Ltd. has announced the filing of an initial Mineral Resource Estimate for the Selkirk Mine in Botswana, detailing a resource of 44.2 million tonnes. The report, prepared in accordance with NI 43-101 standards, signifies a significant step in the redevelopment of the Selkirk deposit, potentially impacting the company’s operations and market positioning within the nickel-copper-platinum group elements sector.

More about North American Nickel

Premium Resources Ltd. is a mineral exploration and development company focusing on the redevelopment of nickel, copper, and cobalt resource mines in Botswana. The company emphasizes governance through transparent accountability and boasts a skilled team with extensive experience in resource discoveries, mine development, and re-engineering projects like the Selebi and Selkirk mines.

data.description:

Ready Set Gold ( (TSE:PATH) ) has issued an announcement.

Newpath Resources Inc. announced the results of its Annual General Meeting where all proposals were approved by shareholders. The re-election of the current board members and the re-appointment of De Visser Gray LLP as auditors were confirmed. This approval supports the company’s ongoing exploration activities and reinforces its strategic direction in the mineral exploration sector.

More about Ready Set Gold

Newpath Resources Inc. is a Canadian exploration company listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the symbol PATH. The company focuses on critical metal exploration through its Orefield project, comprising two claim groups near Lake Nipigon in Northern Ontario. Newpath also owns the Northshore gold project in the Schreiber-Hemlo greenstone belt.

The latest update is out from Enertopia ( (ENRT) ).

Enertopia Corporation announced a 20-for-one share consolidation, effective January 15, 2025, to enhance its capital structure for potential financing opportunities. The move will significantly reduce the number of outstanding shares, potentially making the company more appealing to investors, as part of its strategy to improve market positioning and stakeholder value.

data.title: Carbon Done Right Completes Second Tranche of Private Placement
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An announcement from Earl Resources Limited ( (TSE:KLX) ) is now available.

Carbon Done Right has successfully completed the second tranche of its non-brokered private placement, issuing 10,000,000 shares at $0.015 each, raising $150,000, with total funds raised so far at $255,000. The proceeds are earmarked for supporting their flagship forest carbon restoration project and fulfilling investment requirements under a pre-purchase agreement, with the final tranche expected to close in January 2025, pending regulatory approvals.

More about Earl Resources Limited

Carbon Done Right Developments Inc. is a leading provider of high-quality carbon credits generated from afforestation and reforestation projects owned and developed by the company. It focuses on serving the growing demand for carbon credits from companies aiming to achieve Net Zero goals by investing in the restoration and management of natural ecosystems worldwide.

data.title: Brookfield Asset Management Renews Share Repurchase Program
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. Class A ( (TSE:BAM) ) has issued an update.

Brookfield Asset Management has announced the renewal of its normal course issuer bid, allowing it to purchase up to 37,123,295 Class A Limited Voting Shares, approximately 10% of its public float. This move aligns with the company’s investment strategies and capital allocation plans, with purchased shares being canceled or held by a trustee under long-term incentive plans. The company has also established an automatic purchase plan to facilitate share purchases during trading blackout periods.

More about Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. Class A

Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. is a global alternative asset manager with over $1 trillion of assets under management, focusing on renewable power, infrastructure, private equity, real estate, and credit. The company invests in real assets and essential service businesses, catering to a diverse group of investors including pension plans, endowments, sovereign wealth funds, and insurance companies.
